subject: Re: FW: Your Private Line to TCC!
body:
thanks... come see me the week of the 24th

> Subject: Your Private Line to TCC!

> Dear Mr. Epstein,
> 
>  
> 
> It is with great pleasure (and just a little
> trepidation) that I offer to
> you your personal DID number.  Please use this
> number (below) hereafter for
> any and all your requests throughout The Core Club. 
> 
> 
>  
> 
> 646.475.4416
> 
>  
> 
> This number has been assigned to you and only you,
> and will route through
> our server to shadow and locate me on whichever
> phone I am carrying.  I urge
> you to keep this number private as it is directly
> linked to your profile and
> will recall such by our system each time the number
> is used.  This number
> was designed for your use and the use of your dual
> member or spouse only (of
> course you should forward it to anyone calling on
> your behalf-such as an
> assistant). 
> 
>  
> 
> If it so happens that I am not at the club when you
> call, this number will
> automatically forward to one of my Core Consultant
> teammates (Sylvana Levy
> and Ken Lawson) who will be able to answer whatever
> inquiries you may have,
> or handle whatever reservations you may need.  If
> you should prefer to speak
> directly to me, please feel free to email me, call
> on my cell phone, or one
> of my teammates will know how to contact me.
> 
>  
> 
> Just as a reminder:  The Restaurant at the Core Club

> breakfast, lunch and dinner, Monday through Friday! 
> The Spa is offering
> services on premises and on an outcall basis, and
> Dr. Mehmet Oz will join us

> Please contact me for reservations.

> Warm Regards,

body_html:
thanks... come see me the week of the 24th

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

From: Mimi Langeland
[mailto:mlangeland@thecoreclub.com]
Sent: Monday, October 10, 2005 9:12 AM
To: LESLEY@NYSGLLC.COM
Subject: Your Private Line to TCC!

Dear Mr. Epstein,

It is with great pleasure (and just a little
trepidation) that I offer to
you your personal DID number. Please use this
number (below) hereafter for
any and all your requests throughout The Core Club.

646.475.4416

This number has been assigned to you and only you,
and will route through
our server to shadow and locate me on whichever
phone I am carrying. I urge
you to keep this number private as it is directly
linked to your profile and
will recall such by our system each time the number
is used. This number
was designed for your use and the use of your dual
member or spouse only (of
course you should forward it to anyone calling on
your behalf-such as an
assistant).

If it so happens that I am not at the club when you
call, this number will
automatically forward to one of my Core Consultant
teammates (Sylvana Levy
and Ken Lawson) who will be able to answer whatever
inquiries you may have,
or handle whatever reservations you may need. If
you should prefer to speak
directly to me, please feel free to email me, call
on my cell phone, or one
of my teammates will know how to contact me.

Just as a reminder: The Restaurant at the Core Club
is now open for
breakfast, lunch and dinner, Monday through Friday!
The Spa is offering
services on premises and on an outcall basis, and
Dr. Mehmet Oz will join us
on October 11th in the Screening Room at 7PM for our
Core Conversations!
Please contact me for reservations.

Warm Regards,

Mimi

Mimi Langeland | Core Consultant | THE CORE CLUB |
66 East 55th Street -
New York, New York 10022 | t: 212 486 6600 | m: 646

9928
